name: Function Call Parameter Parser
description: Parse user query to extract function parameters and generate structured function call with parameter values
reasoning: This workflow needs to parse the user query in the `prompt` variable to extract numerical values (4 and 5) and map them to the correct function parameters (x and y for math.hypot). The task requires understanding the context of a hypotenuse calculation and extracting the triangle side lengths from natural language. Since this involves semantic understanding of mathematical concepts and natural language parsing, an LLM-based extraction approach is most appropriate. The activity will analyze the query text, identify the function to call (math.hypot), extract the parameter values, and format them according to the expected output structure with parameter names as keys and values in array format.
